vocab.meaning: khác xa với, hoàn toàn khác biệt
vocab.example: My current interest in historical documentaries is a far cry from the mindless cartoons I was obsessed with as a toddler.

vocab.meaning: khác nhau một trời một vực
vocab.example: If you compare my childhood hobbies to my adult ones, they are like chalk and cheese; I've moved from being hyperactive to quite sedentary.

vocab.meaning: bước sang trang mới (nghĩa bóng: thay đổi hoàn toàn thói quen/sở thích)
vocab.example: When I entered my twenties, I turned over a new leaf and traded video games for long-distance running.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác hưng phấn khi theo đuổi điều gì (như trò chơi đuổi bắt)
vocab.example: As a boy, I lived for the thrill of the chase in games of tag, but now I prefer the quiet satisfaction of finishing a book.

vocab.meaning: trở nên quá lớn/trưởng thành để không còn thích cái gì nữa
vocab.example: I think I simply outgrew the magic of playing with plastic soldiers once I discovered the complexities of real-world history.

vocab.meaning: thay đổi quan điểm/tình cảm đối với cái gì
vocab.example: I used to loathe any form of artistic activity, but I had a change of heart recently and have taken up watercolor painting.

vocab.meaning: có ích cho ai đó trong tương lai
vocab.example: The team sports I played as a kid have stood me in good stead by teaching me cooperation, even though I don't play them anymore.

vocab.meaning: đổ sông đổ biển (mất đi/không còn nữa)
vocab.example: My skill at playing marbles has completely gone down the drain since I haven't touched one in over fifteen years.

vocab.meaning: quay lại với những điều cơ bản/giản đơn
vocab.example: Lately, I’ve gone back to basics, enjoying simple board games with friends just like I did when I was seven.
My adolescent passion for heavy metal and my current love for jazz are worlds apart in terms of energy and mood.
